sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْفُطُورُ وَجْبَةً مُهِمَّةً فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Doručak se smatra važnim obrokom u arapskom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: Breakfast is considered an important meal in the Arab world.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ النَّاسُ الْحُمُّصَ وَالْفَلَافِلَ مَعَ الْخُبْزِ السَّاخِنِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi jedu hummus i falafel uz topli hljeb.
sentences.translationEn: People eat hummus and falafel with hot bread.

sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ الْبَعْضُ شُرْبَ الشَّايِ بِالنَّعْنَانِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Neki više vole piti čaj s nanom ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Some prefer drinking mint tea in the morning.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْوَجْبَةُ تَمْنَحُ الْجِسْمَ طَاقَةً كَبِيرَةً لِبَدْءِ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj obrok daje tijelu veliku energiju za početak dana.
sentences.translationEn: This meal gives the body great energy to start the day.
